title: First Code Line
description: Wrote the first line of code that started it all. What began as curiosity turned into an obsession with building systems.

title: First Music Production
description: Discovered electronic music production. The same patterns that made code elegant found their way into harmonic progression and sound design.

title: First AI Project
description: Built the first machine learning experiment. The intersection of logic and pattern recognition opened a new dimension of creation.

title: The Fusion Moment
description: The realization that software architecture and musical composition are the same discipline — structuring complexity into something beautiful.

title: Public Release
description: First public releases on Spotify. Code and sound finally converged into a single creative identity.

title: Current Momentum
description: Full-stack development at scale. Music production refined. The two worlds no longer separate — they're the same craft.

title: What's Next
description: A new chapter. The release that merges everything. This site is just the beginning.
